name: DoIP_DataReq
title: DoIP_DataReq
syntax: void DoIP_DataReq( byte buffer[], dword count, dword vehicleAddress, dword testerAddress);
description: Request the transfer of the given data to the DoIP peer.

parameters.name: buffer
parameters.description: Buffer containing the data to be transmitted.

parameters.name: vehicleAddress
parameters.description: Logical DoIP address of the ECU, i.e. the target in a tester and the source in an ECU simulation.

parameters.name: testerAddress
parameters.description: An ECU simulation may specify the logical address of the tester to send to by giving a value other than 0 here. Otherwise and in tester nodes, 0 should be given. This will determine the tester’s address automatically, i.e. the configured value in a tester, or the sender address of the last request in an ECU simulation.

availability: CANoe Measurement Setup / CANalyzer Analysis Branch
CANoe Test Setup for Test Modules
CANoe Test Setup for Test Units
